reach_why: Extends familiar proxy-failure critiques to discovery evaluation, but does not open fundamentally new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links lexical diversity, compression bias, and anomaly-driven discovery into one critique of evaluation.
falsifiable_why: Test by adding irrelevant true sentences and checking whether proxy scores improve without better discovery outcomes.
explanation: Weak proxies can reward irrelevant richness and elegance while missing anomaly contact that actually drives discovery.
